title: [全民檢測] 華爾街日報：社區封鎖根本唔撚關事

replies.msg:
睇新聞學英文，星期一至五早晚簡單翻譯啲外國報導，等大家可以雙語吸收資訊，學多啲英文尤其係咁多位DSE仔女一於齊上齊學

今次係特別轉播，多謝 皇天尻殺 巴打叫我譯呢篇好野，內容係勁爆但文法唔容易理解，時間關係我冇做太多解說。大家可以先comment，我聽日再答。

希望睇完幫手Like+推，鍾意就Dog/follow埋我
--------------------------------------------------


https://www.wsj.com/articles/the-failed-experiment-of-covid-lockdowns-11599000890?fbclid=IwAR37iEPyBnF5R133Df0_rd4RBJc2c3wZPfwL_ndd2QMCKJKWgqg0ZvdNXCY

免費source link: https://trendmacro.com/system/files/20200901TrendMacroLuskinWSJ.pdf (多謝 皇天尻殺 巴打)

The Failed Experiment of Covid Lockdowns

//New data suggest that social distancing and reopening haven’t determined the spread. //
「新嘅數據顯示，社交距離同埋重開社區經濟都唔係決定爆發嘅因素。」


//Counterintuitive though it may be, statistical analysis shows that locking down the economy didn’t contain the disease’s spread and reopening it didn’t unleash a second wave of infections. //
「聽落好反智，但數據分析顯示，社區經濟封鎖係阻止唔到病毒傳播，而重開番佢亦唔會導致下一波爆發。」


//Considering that lockdowns are economically costly and create well-documented long-term public-health consequences beyond Covid, imposing them appears to have been a large policy error. //
「有鑑於社區封鎖嘅經濟損失甚大，同時會造成比武肺更嚴重嘅已知長期公共衛生影響，強推封鎖措施似乎一直都係一大政策失誤。」


//At the beginning, when little was known, officials acted in ways they thought prudent. But now evidence proves that lockdowns were an expensive treatment with serious side effects and no benefit to society. //
「打從一開始，官員唔清唔楚，採取佢地認為保守嘅做法。但依家有證有據，証明封鎖係耗費巨大嘅對策，對社會冇益之餘仲帶來嚴重副作用。」


//It could be that strict lockdowns were imposed as a response to already severe outbreaks. But the surprising negative correlation, while statistically weak, persists even when excluding states with the heaviest caseloads. And it makes no difference if the analysis includes other potential explanatory factors such as population density, age, ethnicity, prevalence of nursing homes, general health or temperature. The only factor that seems to make a demonstrable difference is the intensity of mass-transit use. //
「或者嚴厲封鎖係對抗早已嚴峻嘅疫情既對策。之但係，雖然數據支持不足，呢個令人意外嘅(疫情唔關封唔封鎖事)嘅反比關係，喺去除最重症嘅州份之後，仍然正確。就算考慮埋其他潛在重要因素，例如人口密度、年齡、種族、老人院普及度、普遍健康程度同埋地方溫度。唯一可以表現出明顯影響嘅就係地鐵使用嘅密度。」


//The lesson is not that lockdowns made the spread of Covid-19 worse—although the raw evidence might suggest that—but that lockdowns probably didn’t help, and opening up didn’t hurt.//
「結論(教訓)並唔係話「封鎖令疫症傳播更嚴重」 — 雖然最開頭嘅數據可能係咁講 — 而係話「社區封鎖似乎冇咩用，開放番社區都唔會有咩問題」。


//This defies common sense. In theory, the spread of an infectious disease ought to be controllable by quarantine. Evidently not in practice, though we are aware of no researcher who understands why not. //
「咁樣係違反常識。而理論上，傳染病嘅擴散理應可以透過隔離措施去控制。但就算我地知道冇研究人員明點解唔work，證據顯示，(現有措施喺)實際執行上唔係同一回事。」
(呢個位有啲深，聽日可以解。)

//With the evidence we now possess, even the most risk-averse and single-minded public-health officials should hesitate before demanding the next lockdown and causing the next economic recession. //
「照現時我地手頭上嘅證據，即使係最保守同最誠心嘅公共衛生官員，喺要求再封鎖社區多一次然後搞到下一輪經濟下行，都要停一停諗一諗。」

replies.msg: 但係就香港嘅情況來講 地鐵未必係傳播主要途徑 先應該要問嘅係 老人院爆發疫情嘅餘波一路到而家都尚未散去 源頭係從何而來 文章亦都冇提到戴口罩係咪能夠稍為減低
諗起日本有張圖話如果為處理武漢肺炎而停止經濟活動會搞到經濟大崩潰，但如果大家如常生活，對整體影響唔大，而且因為9成武漢肺炎死者都係70歲而上，所以可以解決人口老化問題

香港日日死嗰啲都係長期病患老人
嗰班用「人命」黎道德綁架既人又答唔到點解2019年或之前唔做足「防疫」措施黎保護老弱。

2019或之前日日都有長期病患老人發燒咳嗽氣促然後入院，最後併發症死架啦。係今年先當係驚天大新聞咁報。

一日出三篇
好波
支持

正
已Follow樓主

In July, a publication of the Lancet published research that found similar results looking across countries rather than U.S. states. “A longer time prior to implementation of any lockdown was associated with a lower number of detected cases,” the study concludes. Those findings have now been enhanced by sophisticated measures of actual social distancing, and data from the reopening phase.

白痴個喎 “我地發現lockdown前都係好少case”
就係因為多case先要lockdown嘛 咁同話係遊艇會範圍以外好少有錢佬一樣

佢睇個數字係lockdown左2星期 個病潛伏期都係2星期 咁lockdown後點會即跌呀
應該要睇lockdown左14日後既數字變化先係lockdown效果

而reopen冇爆 咪可以解釋做lockdown有用
Reopen出黎果班冇帶菌 咁先唔會再爆加嘛

篇野中間d資料可能有用 不過個推論真係食哂屎
推

同埋quote埋study, paper 會好啲

個人認為呢篇野係垃圾
Learn English together
push

In July, a publication of the Lancet published research that found similar results looking across countries rather than U.S. states. “A longer time prior to implementation of any lockdown was associated with a lower number of detected cases,” the study concludes.

但係佢quote份research part 4 discussion 已經寫
There were a series of predictors with significant associations with the outcome variables that require careful interpretation. An increased scale of national testing was not associated with the number of critical cases, or deaths per million. The government policy of full lockdowns (vs. partial or curfews only) was strongly associated with recovery rates (RR=2.47; 95%CI: 1.08–5.64). Similarly, the number of days to any border closure was associated with the number of cases per million (RR=1.04; 95%CI: 1.01–1.08). This suggests that full lockdowns and early border closures may lessen the peak of transmission, and thus prevent health system overcapacity, which would facilitate increased recovery rates.
Lm

pinned.msg:
[全民檢測] 華爾街日報：社區封鎖根本唔撚關事
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區
https://lih.kg/aCummGV

有巴打譯法好過我但我都照講下
//In theory, the spread of an infectious disease ought to be controllable by quarantine. Evidently not in practice, though we are aware of no researcher who understands why not.//

意思上，In practice 同 in theory相對應，evidently係evidence既副詞。如果我地將Evidently, not 同 in practice拆開，再放入上一句再改少少:
In practice, the spread of an infectious disease is evidently not controllable by quarantine.
係咪明左好多呢

DSE來講識理解已經好好，但唔識用既話就唔好係writing 用
